jira.label: Jira focus
jira.plan_line: Jira for issue state, project progress, and ownership context.
jira.base_notes: Search Jira issues, projects, sprints, and comments via the Atlassian remote MCP server. Read-only is enforced by a view-only Atlassian account (see SETUP.md) — the server itself has no read-only flag. Never create, transition, assign, or comment on issues.
